title: Infrastructure - ECS Services
description: ECS Fargate service metrics via CloudWatch Container Insights

panels.title: CPU Utilization
panels.description: Current CPU units utilized per service with trend sparkline

panels.title: Memory Utilization
panels.description: Current memory utilized per service (MB) with trend sparkline

panels.title: Running Tasks
panels.description: Number of running tasks per service

panels.title: Desired Tasks
panels.description: Number of desired tasks per service

panels.title: Pending Tasks
panels.description: Tasks pending scheduling - sustained values > 0 indicate resource constraints

panels.title: Network Rate
panels.description: Network receive/transmit bytes per second

panels.title: CPU Utilized (vCPU)
panels.description: Current CPU units utilized per service

panels.title: Memory Utilized (MB)
panels.description: Current memory utilized per service

panels.title: CPU per Service (vCPU units)
panels.description: CPU utilization comparison across services - bar gauge

panels.title: Memory per Service (MB)
panels.description: Memory utilization comparison across services - bar gauge

panels.title: CPU Utilized (vCPU units)
panels.description: CPU units utilized per service over time

panels.title: Memory Utilized (MB)
panels.description: Memory utilization per service over time

panels.title: CPU: Reserved vs Utilized
panels.description: Compare reserved CPU capacity against actual utilization to identify over-provisioning

panels.title: Memory: Reserved vs Utilized
panels.description: Compare reserved memory against actual utilization to identify over-provisioning

panels.title: Ephemeral Storage: Reserved vs Utilized
panels.description: Ephemeral storage capacity analysis per service

panels.title: Resource Efficiency Table
panels.description: Service-by-service resource efficiency comparison

panels.title: Network I/O (Bytes/s)
panels.description: Network receive and transmit throughput per service

panels.title: Storage I/O (Bytes/s)
panels.description: EFS/Storage read and write throughput per service

panels.title: Desired vs Running Tasks
panels.description: Compare desired task count with running tasks to detect scaling issues or task failures

panels.title: Task Count per Service
panels.description: Current running task count for each service
